feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Apps
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Apps Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Can we make Dependant dropdown and based on that dropdown selection custom list should be added?
entry.content: Can we make Dependant dropdown and based on that dropdown selection custom list should be added and that coustom list should be added multiple times while selection of the material dropdown on the click of submit button.

entry.title: SAP BTP Document Upload
entry.content:
Greetings, 

I'm trying to upload document and store them into SQL DB using SAP CPI. 

I already created the logic as follows:
Pick files > Upload files > Set data variable > Create record
I also did the integration part using REST API and linked it to CPI. 

CPI is receiving a record but no file. It is receiving what I put in set data variable (name, path, size and mimeType). 

I missing some key data that would send the file itself to CPI. 

Has anyone worked in creating file upload record in SQL DB? If so what would be the right approach?

entry.title: SAP Build with SAP Gen AI (Joule)
entry.content:
How can i create a mobile application with SAP Build App for a user to chat with Joule and then start a process in SAP Build Process Automation? EX: A field employee must deactivate an equipment for maintenance. He uses a mobile app (SAP Build App or other solution), calls and informs Joule about the serial number of this equipment ( existing in a S/4 HANA CLoud Private edition 2024) . After that, Joule starts a process automation passing the information of this equipment to an approval task of his supervisor who then receives the task in the build process automation.

Is that possible to achieve that today?

entry.title: Can not select input parameter for Action in Business Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am following below blog to replicate the same for employee relocation request - process automation.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/create-workflow-steps-using-sap-build-process-automation/ba-p/13575948

1. i have created the form
2. i have created the action and tested which works fine.
3. in the process i placed the action below form.
4. when action is placed it expects mandt field where i have to provide employee ID, so i selected input then the side panel displays fields available in the form, but i can not able to select.

process overview:

Fields in the form:
form

 


actions input selection from fields in form:
input for action not enabled

 

 

 

Kindly let me know what is the issue and where i am missing. Please help

Thanks,
Gowtham

entry.title: Build Apps POST call - HTTP 403 Error (Invalid CSRF Token)
entry.content:
Hello everyone.

I need your help on something about x-csrf-token problem.

I am making an web application that creates Sales Order to S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition by Build Apps.

Connection to S/4HANA is made by destination, and web application is deployed to my BTP subaccount's HTML5 Repository.

Screenshot under is the destination I set to S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition's "Sales Order(A2X)" OData V2 api.

Type : HTTP

URL : https://{tenant}-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap

Proxy Type : Internet

Authentication : Basic

 

<Additional Properties>

AppgyverEnabled : true

BuildApps.RequiresCsrf : true

HTML5.DynamicDestination : true

sap.applicationdevelopment.actions.enabled : true

sap.build.usage : odata_gen

sap.processautomation.enabled : true

WebIDEEnabled : true

 

Plus, I 

As you can see, I added "BuildApps.RequiresCSRF = true" to my destination so I can see the CSRF token settings too.

However, as I deploy this application and try to create Sales Order, error occurs and I can see this error message in my HTML5 repository.

What should I do to fix this problem??

entry.title: How to use the multiselect combobox feature
entry.content:
I want the selected values from the combo box should get listed in the list repeat The value is not getting stored in the selected section can someone please guide me

 

@Dan_Wroblewski 
@merituulimelkko

entry.title: Change in "Universal REST API integration" in SAP Build Apps ; "Response key path" is missing
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have been using the public REST API: https://services.odata.org/v4/northwind/northwind.svc/Orders.

In the new Configuration UI for "Universal REST API Integration," the "Response Key Path" is missing. I tested the API with the below configuration, saved the schema, and mapped it to a data variable for use across UI containers and components (refer to attached screenshots). However, no data appears during the web or mobile test process.

Please assist.

entry.title: SAP Build Apps: build up nested API payload with 1 to many relation (Purchase requisition)
entry.content:
Hi,

first of all happy new year!

In my SAP Build project i have the requirement to create purchase requisitions in S/4HANA Public Cloud. These PR's consists of 1 header, an x number of items and every item has 1 account assignment and 2 texts.

What is the best way to build up the payload for the API? I am able to create a PR with 1 item, but i am struggling to build up a payload for multiple items.

Is this possible with SET_KEY? Or do i need to write Javascript for this? Or is there any other option?

Creating the items 1 by 1 is not an option as there is an impact on the workflow in S4. 

many thanks,

Sanne

entry.title: Unable to activate Account for Identity Authentication Service via email link
entry.content:
Sometime back today(4th of Jan 2025) received an email for activating the account for SAP Build apps for Identity Authentication service , I am unable to activate after clicking activation button via email link and after doing copy & paste url in browser also not working the link which shared in the email body.

 

When i access the link , i can see that 'Hmm page cant be reachable' and also attached error msg for the reference.

 

Please help me with the right link to activate right link for Identity Authentication service.

entry.title: SAP Build App deployment
entry.content:
Greetings, 

I completed deploying an app in SAP Build. I got a link to the app as shown in the screenshot. 

 

However, I'm not able to find the app in Cloud Foundry - Spaces to start it. 

I'm not sure if the steps I followed are correct or no. I did the publish your app in App Editor


Then I used SAP Build Work Zone to deploy the App. As I understood in order to access the link I need to start it from Cloud Foundry. However, as I said, I'm not finding the app there. 

Can someone tell me in steps what is the right way to publish the app? 

 

Regards,

entry.title: unable to get App Editor view page in sap build apps
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

We have been currently working on SAP Build Apps.While working on one of the requriments we are facing an issue with App Editor view which is unable to load/unable to access. Please refer below screenshot.  

Could you please confirm if there is any glitch or update in SAP Build Apps?

Regards,

Savan Patel

9033993882

savan.p@intellectbizware.com

entry.title: ByD Destination Issue Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi all!

I'm new in the BTP developement and am facing some issues. Specifically in setting up the connection between the BTP and my company's tenant in ByD.

I've looked already into all previous issues and tutorials, but neither helped me solving my problem. 

I've already set up a destination in my btp cockpit twice: One for my actions (not specific, tests as "302 redirect") and one for my Apps (specific, tests as "200 OK", that points to an oData Service as mentioned here  My first steps with BTP destinations (S/4HANA) in ... - SAP Community    ) 

 

When adding the Actions to my Build env, i can see the data in the playground, when i try to execute the action in my test App either i don't see the request beeing made at all or i see an Error 500. 

When I try to add the destination as an Integration i get Error 404 for the one i used for my Actions and 400 for the one i made specific for the App. Bottomline I can't add them in this way. 

destination details:

{
  "name": "byd_test_integration_CLONING",
  "description": "a connection to the test environment",
  "mobile_enabled": false,
  "action_enabled": true,
  "apiType": "catalog",
  "sapSalesAndServiceCloud": {
    "is_mashup": false,
    "is_api_metadata": false,
    "is_api": false
  },
  "is_catalog": true,
  "is_appgyver_metering": false,
  "is_dynamic": true
}

request details:

{
  "headers": {
    "Accept": "application/json, text/plain, */*",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "x-csrf-token": "xxx",
    "x-requested-with": "XMLHttpRequest"
  },
  "baseURL": "/destinations_api/v2/destination/byd_test_integration_CLONING",
  "data": "{\"headers\":{\"accept\":\"application/json, text/plain, */*\"},\"url\":\"\",\"method\":\"get\"}",
  "adapter": [
    "xhr",
    "http",
    "fetch"
  ]
}

respone details:

{
  "status": 400,
  "headers": {
    "content-length": "188",
    "content-type": "application/json; charset=utf-8",
    "date": "Thu, 09 Jan 2025 09:13:17 GMT",
    "etag": "W/\"bc-tSIwzw3CuFMtYZmKug+emEGrR1U\"",
    "strict-transport-security": "max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload",
    "x-correlation-id": "xxx",
    "x-frame-options": "DENY",
    "x-request-id": "xxx"
  },
  "data": {
    "error": "Error: Request failed with status code 400\n---\nRequest failed with status code 400\n",
    "message": "Request failed with status code 400\n---\nRequest failed with status code 400"
  }
}

Instance details:

{
  "tenant_id": "xxx",
  "user_id_for_sentry": "JWTUserId:xxx",
  "environment": "eu10",
  "location": "https://xxx/builder/applications/176610/data",
  "cfdomain": "xxx",
  "enabled_features": [
    "newTopNav",
    "releaseManagement",
    "adobeTracking",
    "getUserInfo",
    "vcfEnableOpaAuthorization",
    "actionIntegration",
    "useMobileAppRepackaging",
    "useWebBuildDependencyProxy",
    "customRequestHeader"
  ],
  "datetime": "2025-01-09T09:13:18.808Z"
}

When I try to integrate as legacy entities, both destinations aren't discovered in the SAP BTP Destination REST API Integration as options. 

I tryied adding the Endpoint  as Universal REST Api Integration, but I get 401 Unauthorized as an answer even though i've explicitely set the Authorization header with the correct base64 credential. 

I've also tryied adding as plain oData, but again, 401 not Authorized. 

Is there a standard way to add a ByD Destination with which i can interact in a Build Apps use case? Or a step by step guide? I really doubt that I'm the first one facing such problem...

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - Delete Item Persistent Storage
entry.content:
Hello

My first post on this forum so excuse me if I have posted to the wrong area...

I have user details saved to local storage called 'persistUser' which is a collection of five records (including user email, password, etc.).

I cannot figure out how to delete it.  I am having trouble navigating this site, so if there are existing solutions, would appreciate being pointed that way.  The only thing I have been able to find is some referencing to looping as I need to delete each record one at a time.

What is really confusing me is that I have the record collection set up with a field called 'key' which is what I am using to identy the record...but when I add logic such as 'Delete record' to the canvas, there is no obvious way I can enter this key so how does the flow know what record to delete?  Really something simple..but I have spend days getting no where...

Any help greatly appreciated.

SAP Build Apps

entry.title: Unable to add a new resource in create data entity option in Create an Application with SAP Build
401 Unauthorized - Build Apps Unable to Access BTP Destination API
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing strange error while calling SAP Build process automation from SAP Build apps using SAP Build apps published library API integration in which i have published my build process automation API trigger.

Performed all steps correctly in steps provided in "https://help.sap.com/docs/build-apps/service-guide/sap-build-process-automation?q=service+key".

When i debugged the issue i found the error as below

"{
"status": 401,
"statusText": "Unauthorized",
"headers": {
"cache-control": "no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate",
"expires": "0",
"pragma": "no-cache",
"referrer-policy": "no-referrer",
"www-authenticate": "Bearer error=\"invalid_token\", error_description=\"Jwt token with allowed audiences [destination-xsappname!b62, uaa, openid, xs_account, sb-clone850d95a770d2421f962aa985e61e9bda!b107153|destination-xsappname!b62] matches none of these: [xsuaa!b120249]\", error_uri=\"https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6750#section-3.1\"",
"x-content-type-options": "nosniff",
"x-frame-options": "DENY",
"x-vcap-request-id": "70a2438e-ac45-4a98-4696-cf9c0fa58649",
"x-xss-protection": "0",
"date": "Sun, 12 Jan 2025 09:18:37 GMT",
"strict-transport-security": "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload;",
"connection": "close"
},
"responseText": ""
}

Any help will be appreciated.

entry.title: Issues Completing Tutorials with SAP Build Work Zone on Trial Account
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently working through the following tutorials:

  • SAP Build Work Zone - Add a Workspace
  • Access SAP Build Apps via SAP Work Zone
  • Work Zone Workshop - Access

However, I am using a trial account and cannot access certain features required for these tutorials. For example:

  • In the SAP Build Work Zone Standard Edition, I cannot access the "Manage Workspaces and Workpages" section, which seems to be exclusive to the Advanced Edition.
  • I also noticed that the prerequisites for some tutorials mention receiving a specific URL, username, and password for the training account, which I did not receive.

My main question is:

  • How can I complete these tutorials on a trial account, or is there a way to request temporary access to the Advanced Edition for training purposes?
  • Alternatively, can I contact the tutorial instructor or support team to gain the necessary credentials or guidance?

I appreciate any advice or assistance you can provide to help me resolve this issue.

Thank you in advance!

Best regards,
Luigi Funaro

entry.title: Badge display
entry.content: Not able to see my badge after successfully completing a mission. Kindly help!!!

entry.title: How to validate the signup process with data variable
entry.content:
I have login form with 3 values as(page variable) which i need to get check with the data.Users_list(data variable) if username, password, usertype get matched user should get login

pageVars.u_username === data.Users_list[0].fields.username && pageVars.u_pass === data.Users_list[0].fields.password && pageVars.u_type === data.Users_list[0].fields.user_type

@Dan_Wroblewski 
@merituulimelkko

@SAPSupport

entry.title: Creation of another project in SAP Build
entry.content: I am unable to create another project in SAP Build. Quick response to this is highly appreciated.

entry.title: SAP Mobile Start fails to load App
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have created a site on Workzone where I have associated an app developed with SAP Build. If I open the site from the browser, I can access the app without any problems. However, if I access it via Mobile Start, I see the application tile, but when I click on it, I get the following error: "unable to load external app" on iOS, "unable to open app" on Android.

The application was developed using a trial account.

Below are all the steps I followed for the configuration:

  • Built and deployed the app in "SAP Build Apps | Build Service" for Work Zone
  • Added the app to Work Zone
  • Enabled the site setting for Mobile Start
  • Tested the app in the web launchpad and it works correctly
  • Downloaded Mobile Start on iOS and Android
  • Performed BTP authentication
  • Successfully connected to the launchpad
  • Viewed group and app
  • Clicking on the app, the error "unable to load external app" appears on iOS and "unable to open app" on Android

Do you have any idea what the problem might be?

Thank you all.
